name: Set up Zendesk Chat
body: [{"type": "h3", "children": [{"text": "This add-on was built by Zopim."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Visit Add-On Website"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "For support with this add-on "}, {"type": "a", "url": "", "children": [{"text": "contact "}]}, {"text": "."}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "To Install and Set up the Zendesk Chat Add-on"}]}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "In your Neto control panel navigate to the "}, {"text": "Addons", "bold": true}, {"text": " store and look for "}, {"text": "Zendesk Chat", "bold": true}, {"text": " and click "}, {"text": "Install", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Insert the "}, {"text": "Header Script", "bold": true}, {"text": " to insert into the pop up window that appears."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "To find this header script, go to "}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://www.zendesk.com/service/messaging/live-chat/", "children": [{"text": "https://www.zendesk.com/service/messaging/live-chat/"}]}, {"text": " and either sign-in or register your account."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "From the left hand side menu, click "}, {"text": "Widgets", "bold": true}, {"text": " and copy the Zopim provided live chat widget code and paste it into the header script field in Neto."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}]}]}]
